memoryArtifacts.description: The clothing in the image isn't exactly to the period since Massachusetts was a Puritan colony. They also most likely wouldn't have been dancing. Still, an interesting painting.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Warren於1624年9月12日出生在英國素福爾可萊塔姆時，她的父親John Warren III39歲，母親Margaret Abbott32歲。她於1642年3月30日與John Bigelow在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1691年10月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年67歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃爾坦葛洛夫 希爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Warren于1624年9月12日出生在英国素福爾可萊塔姆时，她的父亲John Warren III39岁，母亲Margaret Abbott32岁。她于1642年3月30日与John Bigelow在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1691年10月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年67岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃爾坦葛洛夫 希爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Warren
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Warin, Werin, a borrowing of ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. Compare Waring .

English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from La Varrenne in Seine-Maritime, France, named with a Gaulish element probably descriptive of alluvial land or sandy soil. This was the name of a major Norman family after the Conquest. In Ireland, this name has been Gaelicized as Bharain.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane , Warner ).

variants.name: Warrens
meanings: English: variant of Warren with genitival or excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Warrener
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French warrennier ‘warrener’, an officer employed to watch over game in a park or game preserve. Compare Warren .

variants.name: Murnane
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin, a shortened and dissimilated form of Ó Manannáin ‘descendant of Manannán’, name borne in Celtic mythology by a sea god associated with the Isle of Man. All three syllables appear in the variant Marrinan. This name has also been Anglicized as Warren and Warner .

variants.name: Warne
meanings: occasionally a habitational name from Wearne in Somerset. The place takes its name from a lost stream-name based on British verno- ‘alder, swamp’.

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest Grave seen in the Memoirals list

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Warren was born on 12 September 1624, in Wrentham, Suffolk, England, her father, John Warren III, was 39 and her mother, Margaret Abbott, was 32. She married John Bigelow on 30 March 1642, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 19 October 1691, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 67, and was buried in Grove Hill Cemetery, Waltham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Warren est née le 12 septembre 1624, à Wrentham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Warren III, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret Abbott, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John Bigelow le 30 mars 1642, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 octobre 1691, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Grove Hill Cemetery, Waltham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Warren am 12. September 1624 in Wrentham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Warren III 39 und ihre Mutter Margaret Abbott 32. Sie hat am 30. März 1642 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Bigelow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Warren è nata il il 12 settembre 1624 nel Wrentham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Warren III, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Margaret Abbott, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato John Bigelow il 30 marzo 1642, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 19 ottobre 1691, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Grove Hill Cemetery, Waltham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Warrenが1624年9月12日にイギリススフォルクウレンサムで生まれた時，父John Warren IIIは39歳，母Margaret Abbottは32歳であった。1642年3月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでJohn Bigelowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1691年10月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで67歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワルサムグローブ ヒル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Warren(이)가 1624년 9월 12일 영국 수폴크 렌섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Warren III(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Abbott(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1642년 3월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 John Bigelow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1691년 10월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 월섬 그로브 힐 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Warren nasceu em 12 de setembro de 1624, em Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Warren III, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Abbott, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John Bigelow em 30 de março de 1642, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1691, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Grove Hill Cemetery, Waltham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Littleton, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: литлетон, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика

ru.Grove Hill Cemetery, Waltham, Middlesex,: гров хилл кеметири, валтам, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Warren родилась 12 сентября 1624 г. в местности рентам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Warren III было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Abbott, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bigelow 30 марта 1642 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 19 октября 1691 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности гров хилл кеметири, валтам, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Warren nació el 12 de septiembre de 1624, en Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Warren III, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret Abbott, tenía 32 años. Se casó con John Bigelow el 30 de marzo de 1642, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1691, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Grove Hill Cemetery, Waltham, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
